Tradeify 3.0 – Program Updates & Improvements
Everything new in Tradeify 3.0: Elite Live reward model, new account structures, rule changes, pricing updates, new platforms, dashboard upgrades, and trading journal integration.

April 7, 2026

Table of contents

Welcome to Tradeify 3.0 -- a major upgrade to the Tradeify experience and how traders are rewarded, funded, and scaled.

This release introduces a new Elite Live reward system, improved account structures, a brand new user experience, and a fully integrated trading ecosystem.

What's New -- At a Glance

- New Performance Reward Pool for every live account

- Earn up to $90,000 in additional rewards

- Bigger rewards for disciplined traders

- Brand new user experience across the Tradeify platform

- Instant funded activation

- No more subscriptions -- one-time fees only

- New platforms: Rithmic & Tradesea

- Trading journal now fully integrated

Tradeify Elite Live -- New Reward Model

Performance Reward Pool

Every trader who transitions to a Tradeify Elite Live account receives a Performance Reward Pool per account.

This creates a clear, structured way to earn additional rewards on top of trading profits.

Reward Pool by Account Size

Account Size

Reward Pool

$25K

$2,000

$50K

$4,000

$100K

$8,000

$150K

$12,000

- Each account has its own independent pool

- Earned through consistent live trading performance

Example

If you trade:

- 5 x $150K accounts

- $12,000 per account

- $60,000 total reward pool

Performance Multiplier (1.5x Boost)

Select plan traders who demonstrate discipline and consistency during their Sim Funded phase are rewarded with a larger pool. The 1.5x Performance Multiplier is exclusively available to Select plan traders.

Qualification Criteria

- Consistency score below 40%

- Never exceeded 75% of max drawdown

If both criteria are met, your reward pool increases by 50% per account.

Standard vs Multiplier Pool

Account

Standard

With Multiplier

$25K

$2,000

$3,000

$50K

$4,000

$6,000

$100K

$8,000

$12,000

$150K

$12,000

$18,000

Example

If you trade:

- 5 x $150K accounts and went live meeting multiplier criteria

- $18,000 per account

- $90,000 total reward pool

How Rewards Are Earned (Monthly)

Each account earns rewards monthly by meeting simple, repeatable criteria.

Maximum Monthly Rewards

Account

Monthly Reward

$25K

Up to $1,000

$50K

Up to $2,000

$100K

Up to $3,000

$150K

Up to $4,000

Monthly Requirements (Per Account)

To unlock a payout:

- Achieve 5 profitable days ($250 or more per day)

- End the month with profit greater than trailing drawdown:

Account

Required Profit

$25K

$1,000

$50K

$2,000

$100K

$3,000

$150K

$4,500

- Evaluated independently per account

- Breached accounts forfeit remaining pool

Example

5 x $150K accounts:

- Total pool: $60,000

- Monthly payout: $4,500 x 5 = $22,500/month

Your Reward Pool. Your Choice.

Earnings from your reward pool are fully flexible:

- Cash Out Anytime -- Withdraw real earnings.

- Boost Your Account -- Increase your drawdown buffer and scale faster.

- Build a Comeback Fund -- Save rewards to reload if an account is breached.

New Account Structures

Tradeify Select 25K

Evaluation

- Profit Target: $1,500

- Max Loss Limit: $1,000

- Max Contracts: 1

- Consistency: 40%

Paths to Funded

Flex Path

- 5 profitable days ($100 or more per day)

- MLL: $1,000

Flex Payout:

- 50% of balance (max $1,250)

- Must be net profitable

Daily Path

- DLL: $500

- Buffer: $1,100

- MLL: $1,000

Daily Payout:

- Up to 2x profit in the payout period

- Max $600 per payout period

Tradeify Growth 25K

Evaluation

- Profit Target: $1,500

- Max Loss Limit: $1,000

- Daily Loss Limit: $600

- No consistency rule

Funded Account

- MLL: $1,000

- DLL: $600

- Consistency: 35%

Payouts

- Minimum balance: $1,500

- Max payout: $1,000

Plan Rule Changes

Select 50K Profit Target

- Increased from $2,500 to $3,000

- The reduced $50K profit target of $2,500 was introduced as a trial on launch of Select, and we are now returning to the standard $3,000 target, allowing Tradeify to offer it more flexibly across future promotions.

- Applies to new accounts only

- Existing accounts remain unchanged (including resets)

Lightning Funded 150K Risk Update

Parameter

New Value

MLL

$5,250

DLL

$3,000

- The Lightning Funded 150K has always been a premium product -- instead of increasing pricing, we've adjusted the drawdown to keep it accessible while allowing it to be included in Tradeify promotions.

- Drawdown still above most 150K accounts

- Applies to new accounts only

Pricing Updates

No More Subscriptions

- All plans are now one-time purchase only

- No recurring billing

- Up to ~3% price increase across Select and Growth plans

Existing subscriptions remain until cancelled.

New Platform Integrations

New supported platforms:

- Rithmic

- Tradesea

Tradesea is a next-generation TradingView-based platform built for modern traders, combining integrated AI features, smart lockout controls, and a slick, high-performance interface -- with beta launching Tuesday, March 24th.

Real-Time Dashboard Upgrades

Instant Funded Activation

Activate funded accounts immediately once:

- Profit target is achieved

- Consistency requirement is met

Fully Integrated Trading Journal

The Tradeify journal is now fully integrated into the dashboard.

- Track performance

- Analyse trades

- Improve consistency

- All in one place

Brand New User Experience

Tradeify 3.0 introduces a completely upgraded platform experience:

- Faster, cleaner, and more intuitive interface

- Real-time performance tracking across all accounts

- Seamless account management and activation

- Fully integrated tools -- no need for external platforms

Everything is now designed to help you focus on trading, not managing tools.

Final Takeaway

Tradeify 3.0 is built to:

- Unlock up to $90,000+ in additional rewards

- Reward consistent and disciplined traders

- Deliver a faster, more seamless experience

- Provide better tools to improve performance
